description: A designed square 'THE WORST FIRST' arrest card. Unlike most cards in the set, the background here is an actual desaturated black-and-white surveillance/booking-style photograph of the named individual: a bald, stern-faced adult man with a goatee, wearing a dark jacket, shown from the chest up against a tiled/brick interior wall. A dark gradient on the left supports the text. Top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with white subline '2/12/2025 | St. Paul, MN'. Red diagonal top-right banner reads 'ST. PAUL'. Large bold white name at left: 'Sergio Angel Montes-Sanchez'. Bold white 'CRIME:' label with bullet 'Criminal sexual conduct'. Bottom-left round DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; bottom-right red box '-THE- WORST FIRST'. Propaganda technique: showing the actual face of an alleged sex offender alongside his name and crime to personalize the 'criminal alien' threat and justify removal. Target audience: general public and local media in the upper Midwest.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/12/2025 | St. Paul, MN; Sergio Angel Montes-Sanchez; CRIME: Criminal sexual conduct; ST. PAUL; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
